name: ironclad
description: IRONCLAD — multi-coach gym workout app (CBUM & Hrithik). Capacitor iOS wrapper.

scripts.build: rm -rf www && mkdir -p www && cp workout-app.html www/index.html && cp manifest.json www/ && cp icon.png www/ && cp -R anatomy www/anatomy && cp -R exfig www/exfig
scripts.sync: npm run build && cap sync ios
